message:
style(connectors): systematic Duration assertion cleanup + connector-specific improvements

Systematic changes across 33 connector error.rs modules:
- Replace Duration::from_millis(5_000) with Duration::from_secs(5) in retry_after
  test assertions for cleaner idiomatic Rust (aws, azure, bluebubbles, brave-search,
  calendly, circleci, cloudflare, coda, confluence, deepgram, dockerhub, elevenlabs,
  exa, feishu, gcp, hackernews, hue, line, mastodon, mistral, netlify, openrouter,
  paypal, shopify, square, supabase, tavily, tlon, twitch, whatsapp, zalo, zalouser,
  zoom)

Connector-specific improvements:
- discord/client: modernize raw pointer syntax (&*client → &raw const *client)
- discord/gateway: replace .to_string().into() with explicit serde_json::to_string()
  for WebSocket payload serialization (hello, dispatch, heartbeat payloads) — makes
  the serialization step visible and eliminates implicit From<String> coercions
- discord/types: add clippy::redundant_clone allow attr for clone-focused tests
- irc/session: remove unnecessary .collect::<Vec<_>>() in favor of .count()
- irc/types: Duration::from_secs in timeout assertion tests
- matrix/connector: fix doc comment formatting (backtick capability_id)
- nostr/types: use String::new() instead of "".into() for empty pubkey test
- synology-chat/client: remove unnecessary serde_json::to_value(&json!(...)) ref
  and unnecessary raw.clone(); fix integer literal grouping (1_646_827_836_131_i64)
- datadog/client: use concat! macro for string literal with special chars to avoid
  confusing brace/ampersand parsing
- gcp/jwt: add new JWT utility module (430 lines)
- 5 connector integration test suites updated (google-ai, microsoft365, pinecone,
  slack, youtube)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
